title: An Act to Clarify Responsibility for Compensation of Court-appointed Attorneys in Certain Proceedings
last_house_action: 4/2/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2026 - Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

actions.description: Reported that the same be REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY , pursuant to the Maine Revised Statutes, Title 4, section 1804, subsection 3, paragraph H. Report READ and ACCEPTED . Bill and accompanying papers REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY. Sent down for concurrence.
Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports READ. Senator PIERCE of Cumberland moved to ACCEPT The Majority Ought to Pass As Amended Report. On motion by Same Senator Tabled until Later in Today's Session, pending ACCEPTANCE of The Majority Ought to Pass As Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) Report. Unfinished Business.

Taken from the table by the President The Senate ACCEPTED The Majority Ought to Pass As Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) Report. READ ONCE. Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) READ. On motion by Senator CARNEY of Cumberland Senate Amendment "A" (S-589) to Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) READ and ADOPTED. Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) as Amended by Senate Amendment "A" (S-589) thereto ADOPTED. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) as Amended by Senate Amendment "A" (S-589) thereto. Sent down for concurrence

Reports READ . On motion of Representative KUHN of Falmouth, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) was READ . Senate Amendment "A" (S-589) to Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) was READ and ADOPTED . Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) as Amended by Senate Amendment "A" (S-589) thereto was ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-582) . as Amended by Senate Amendment "A" (S-589) thereto. In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending ENACTMENT in concurrence.
Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)
